children.text: be fined under this title, imprisoned not more than 1 year, or both;
may be fined a further sum equal to the money so loaned or gratuity given; and
shall be disqualified from holding office as an examiner.

children.heading: .—Definitions
children.label: b .—Definitions
children.text: In this section, the terms “examiner”, “Federal financial institution regulatory agency”, “financial institution”, and “loan” have the same meanings as in section 212.
